user_query: I want to surprise my sister with a customized playlist of her favorite artist, Ed Sheeran. Can you help me find all the albums and singles by Ed Sheeran and provide the lyrics to his top tracks? It would be amazing if you could also suggest other artists he has collaborated with.

TaskList.description: Retrieve all albums and singles by Ed Sheeran.
Fetch the lyrics for Ed Sheeran's top tracks.
Suggest other artists that Ed Sheeran has collaborated with.
